post.description: This operation imports the prepared data files to a <include target="milvus">Milvus instance</include><include target="zilliz">Zilliz Cloud cluster</include>. To learn how to prepare your data files, read <include target="milvus">[Prepare Data Import](https://milvus.io/docs/prepare-source-data.md)</include><include target="zilliz">[Prepare Data Import](/docs/prepare-data-import)</include>.

zh-CN.description: 本接口可将预处理好的数据文件导入到 <include target="milvus">Milvus 实例</include><include target="zilliz">Zilliz Cloud 集群</include>。了解如何准备数据文件，请阅读<include target="milvus">《准备数据导入》</include><include target="zilliz">《准备数据导入》</include>。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be an API key with appropriate privileges.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为具备适当权限的 API 密钥。

clusterId.description:
The ID of the serving cluster to which the collection belongs.
Setting this to a non-existing cluster results in an error. You can get the cluster ID by calling the [`/v2/clusters`](/reference/restful/list-clusters-v2) endpoint, or copy the cluster ID from the [Zilliz Cloud console](/docs/on-zilliz-cloud-console).

zh-CN.description: Collection 所属的服务集群 ID。设置为不存在的集群将导致错误。您可以通过调用 [`/v2/clusters`](/reference/restful/list-clusters-v2) 端点获取集群 ID，或从 [Zilliz Cloud 控制台](/docs/on-zilliz-cloud-console) 复制集群 ID。

x-admonition.title: Note
x-admonition.content: This applies only to serving clusters on Zilliz Cloud.

zh-CN.title: 说明
zh-CN.content: 仅适用于 Zilliz Cloud 上的服务集群。

dbName.description:
The name of the database that to which the collection belongs .
Setting this to a non-existing database results in an error.

zh-CN.description: Collection 所属的数据库名称。设置为不存在的数据库将导致错误。

collectionName.description:
The name of the target collection.
Setting this to a non-existing collection results in an error.

zh-CN.description: 目标 Collection 的名称。设置为不存在的 Collection 将导致错误。

partitionName.description:
The name of the target partition.
Setting this to a non-existing partition results in an error.

zh-CN.description: 目标 Partition 的名称。设置为不存在的 Partition 将导致错误。

volumeName.description: The name of the volume from which the data files will be uploaded. The volume must be created beforehand. For details, refer to [Create Volume](/reference/restful/create-volume-v2)

zh-CN.description: 数据文件上传的源 volume 名称。该 volume 需事先创建。详情请参考 [创建 volume](/reference/restful/create-volume-v2)

dataPaths.description: The paths of the data files to be uploaded. The paths should be relative to the root of the specified volume.

zh-CN.description: 待上传的数据文件路径列表。路径应相对于指定 volume 的根目录。

items.description: A list of the paths of the data files to be uploaded. Each list contains only one path.

zh-CN.description: 待上传的数据文件路径列表。每个列表包含一个路径。

items.description: The path of the data file to be uploaded. The path should be relative to the root of the specified volume.

zh-CN.description: 待上传数据文件路径。

projectId.description:
The ID of the project to which the database and collection belongs.
Setting this to a non-existing project results in an error. You can get the project ID by calling the [`/v2/projects`](/reference/restful/list-projects-v2) endpoint, or copy the project ID from the [Zilliz Cloud console](/docs/on-zilliz-cloud-console).

zh-CN.description: Database 和 Collection 所属的项目 ID。设置为不存在的项目将导致错误。您可以通过调用 [`/v2/projects`](/reference/restful/list-projects-v2) 端点获取项目 ID，或从 [Zilliz Cloud 控制台](/docs/on-zilliz-cloud-console) 复制项目 ID。

x-admonition.title: Note
x-admonition.content: This applies only to on-demand compute clusters and databases on Zilliz Cloud.

zh-CN.title: 说明
zh-CN.content: 仅适用于 Zilliz Cloud 上的按需计算集群和数据库。

regionId.description:
The ID of the region to which the database and collection belongs.
Setting this to a non-existing region results in an error. You can get the region ID by calling the [`/v2/regions`](/reference/restful/list-cloud-regions-v2) endpoint, or copy the region ID from the [Zilliz Cloud console](/docs/on-zilliz-cloud-console).

zh-CN.description: Database 和 Collection 所属的地域 ID。设置为不存在的地域将导致错误。您可以通过调用 [`/v2/regions`](/reference/restful/list-cloud-regions-v2) 端点获取地域 ID，或从 [Zilliz Cloud 控制台](/docs/on-zilliz-cloud-console) 复制地域 ID。

x-admonition.title: Note
x-admonition.content: This applies only to on-demand compute clusters and databases on Zilliz Cloud.

zh-CN.title: 说明
zh-CN.content: 仅适用于 Zilliz Cloud 上的按需计算集群和数据库。

dbName.description:
The name of the database that to which the collection belongs .
Setting this to a non-existing database results in an error.

zh-CN.description: Collection 所属的数据库名称。设置为不存在的数据库将导致错误。

collectionName.description:
The name of the target collection.
Setting this to a non-existing collection results in an error.

zh-CN.description: 目标 Collection 的名称。设置为不存在的 Collection 将导致错误。

partitionName.description:
The name of the target partition.
Setting this to a non-existing partition results in an error.

zh-CN.description: 目标 Partition 的名称。设置为不存在的 Partition 将导致错误。

volumeName.description: The name of the volume from which the data files will be uploaded. The volume must be created beforehand. For details, refer to [Create Volume](/reference/restful/create-volume-v2)

zh-CN.description: 数据文件上传的源 volume 名称。该 volume 需事先创建。详情请参考 [创建 volume](/reference/restful/create-volume-v2)

dataPaths.description: The paths of the data files to be uploaded. The paths should be relative to the root of the specified volume.

zh-CN.description: 待上传的数据文件路径列表。路径应相对于指定 volume 的根目录。

items.description: A list of the paths of the data files to be uploaded. Each list contains only one path.

zh-CN.description: 待上传的数据文件路径列表。每个列表包含一个路径。

items.description: The path of the data file to be uploaded. The path should be relative to the root of the specified volume.

zh-CN.description: 待上传数据文件路径。

clusterId.description:
The ID of the serving cluster to which the collection belongs.
Setting this to a non-existing cluster results in an error. You can get the cluster ID by calling the [`/v2/clusters`](/reference/restful/list-clusters-v2) endpoint, or copy the cluster ID from the [Zilliz Cloud console](/docs/on-zilliz-cloud-console).

zh-CN.description: Collection 所属的服务集群 ID。设置为不存在的服务集群将导致错误。您可以通过调用 [`/v2/clusters`](/reference/restful/list-clusters-v2) 端点获取集群 ID，或从 [Zilliz Cloud 控制台](/docs/on-zilliz-cloud-console) 复制集群 ID。

x-admonition.title: Note
x-admonition.content: This applies only to serving clusters on Zilliz Cloud.

zh-CN.title: 说明
zh-CN.content: 仅适用于 Zilliz Cloud 上的服务集群。

dbName.description:
The name of the database that to which the collection belongs .
Setting this to a non-existing database results in an error.

zh-CN.description: Collection 所属的数据库名称。设置为不存在的数据库将导致错误。

collectionName.description:
The name of the target collection.
Setting this to a non-existing collection results in an error.

zh-CN.description: 目标 Collection 的名称。设置为不存在的 Collection 将导致错误。

partitionName.description:
The name of the target partition.
Setting this to a non-existing partition results in an error.

zh-CN.description: 目标 Partition 的名称。设置为不存在的 Partition 将导致错误。

items.description: A list of file paths, relative to the root of your Milvus bucket on the MinIO instance shipped along with the Milvus instance.

zh-CN.description: 文件路径列表，列表中的路径均需位于 MinIO 实例上 Milvus 附带的 Milvus 根目录。

items.description: A sub-list that contains a single JSON or Parquet file, or a set of NumPy files.

zh-CN.description: 包含单个 JSON 文件, Parquet 文件或一组 NumPy 文件的子列表。

files.description: The files that contain the data to import. The files should reside within the Milvus bucket on the MinIO instance deployed along with your Milvus instance.

zh-CN.description: 包含待导入数据的文件。这些文件均应位于 MinIO 实例上 Milvus 部署的 Milvus 根目录下。

timeout.description: The timeout duration of the created import jobs. The value should be a positive number suffixed by __s__ (seconds), __m__ (minutes), and __h__(hours). For example, _300s_, _1.5h_, and _1h45_ are all valid values.

zh-CN.description: 创建导入任务的超时时长。该值应为一个以秒、分钟或小时为单位的正数。例如，300s、1.5h、1h45 都是有效值。
批量导入任务选项设置。

objectUrl.description: The URL of the object to import. This URL should be accessible to the S3-compatible object storage service, such as AWS S3, GCS, Azure blob storage.

zh-CN.description: 待导入数据的 URL。该 URL 应来自与诸如阿里云 OSS 或腾讯云 COS 等与 MinIO S3 兼容的对象存储服务。

objectUrls.description:
The URLs of the objects to import.
Applicable formats and how to import multiple objects in one job are as follows:
  • Parquet
  • JSON
  • NumPy

zh-CN.description:
待批量导入的对象 URL列表。
当前支持的文件类型及如何在同一个任务中批量导入多个相同类型的数据文件，可参考：
  • Parquet
  • JSON
  • NumPy

items.description:
A list of the URL to the data file containing a batch of entities to import.
Each list contains only one URL.
待导入 Entity 所在的数据文件或文件夹 URL。

zh-CN.description: 包含待导入 Entity 的数据文件 URL。每个 URL 独占一个列表。
待导入 Entity 所在的数据文件或文件夹 URL 列表。每个 列表包含一个 URL。

accessKey.description: The access key of the object storage service.

zh-CN.description: 对象存储服务的访问密钥 (AK)。

secretKey.description: The secret access key of the object storage service.

zh-CN.description: 对象存储服务的访问密钥 (SK)。

token.description: A temporary token for you to access the object storage service. The token name and the way to obtain it may vary with cloud providers. For details, refer to [the FAQ](/docs/faq-data-import#can-i-use-session-tokens-when-importing-data-from-an-object-storage-service).

projectId.description:
The ID of the project to which the database and collection belongs.
Setting this to a non-existing project results in an error. You can get the project ID by calling the [`/v2/projects`](/reference/restful/list-projects-v2) endpoint, or copy the project ID from the [Zilliz Cloud console](/docs/on-zilliz-cloud-console).

zh-CN.description: Database 和 Collection 所属的项目 ID。设置为不存在的项目将导致错误。您可以通过调用 [`/v2/projects`](/reference/restful/list-projects-v2) 端点获取项目 ID，或从 [Zilliz Cloud 控制台](/docs/on-zilliz-cloud-console) 复制项目 ID。

x-admonition.content: This applies only to on-demand compute clusters and databases on Zilliz Cloud.

zh-CN.content: 仅适用于 Zilliz Cloud 上的按需计算集群和数据库。

zh-CN.description: Database 和 Collection 所属的地域 ID。设置为不存在的地域将导致错误。您可以通过调用 [`/v2/regions`](/reference/restful/list-cloud-regions-v2) 端点获取地域 ID，或从 [Zilliz Cloud 控制台](/docs/on-zilliz-cloud-console) 复制地域 ID。

200.description: The ID of the bulk-import job.

zh-CN.description: 批量导入任务的 ID。
响应码。

data.description: Response payload which carries the IDs of the created bulk-import jobs.

zh-CN.description: 响应负载，包含了当前操作创建的批量导入任务的 ID。
一个已创建的批量导入任务。

jobId.description: The ID of the current bulk-import job.

zh-CN.description: 当前创建的批量导入任务 ID。
返回错误消息。
响应码。
错误描述。

post.description: This operation lists all import jobs of a specific cluster.

zh-CN.description: 本接口可列出当前集群的所有导入任务。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be an API key with appropriate privileges.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为具备适当权限的 API 密钥。
使用 `application/json`。

clusterId.description: ID of a specific cluster on Zilliz Cloud.

zh-CN.description: Zilliz Cloud 上的特定集群的 ID。

pageSize.description: Number of records to return at each request.

zh-CN.description: 每次返回的记录数。
当前页码。

dbName.description: Name of the database to which the import job belongs.

200.description: Returns a list of import jobs

zh-CN.description: 返回导入任务列表。
响应码。

count.description: Total number of records listed in this response.

zh-CN.description: 本次返回的记录总数。

currentPage.description: Current page number for your reference.

zh-CN.description: 当前页码。

pageSize.description: Maximum number of records to be included in each return.

zh-CN.description: 每次返回包含的最大记录数。

collectionName.description: Name of the target collection of this import job.

zh-CN.description: 当前导入任务的目标 Collection 名称。
当前导入任务的 ID。
当前导入任务的状态。
当前导入任务的进度。

reason.description: Reason for the failure of this import job.

zh-CN.description: 当前导入任务失败的原因。
导入任务的详细信息。

records.description: List of import jobs in detail.

zh-CN.description: 导入任务详情列表。

data.description: Response payload, which is a list of import jobs in detail.

zh-CN.description: 响应负载，为导入任务详情列表。
返回错误消息。
响应码。
错误描述。

post.description: Retrieves the progress of a specified import job.

zh-CN.description: 本接口可获取指定导入任务的进度信息。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be an API key with appropriate privileges.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为具备适当权限的 API 密钥。
使用 `application/json`。

jobId.description: The ID of the import job in concern

zh-CN.description: 指定导入任务 ID。

clusterId.description: The ID of a cluster to which this operation applies.

zh-CN.description: 指定集群 ID。

jobId.description: The ID of the import job in concern

zh-CN.description: 指定导入任务 ID。

projectId.description: The ID of a project to which this operation applies.

zh-CN.description: 指定项目 ID。

regionId.description: The ID of a region to which this operation applies.

zh-CN.description: 指定地域 ID。

200.description: Returns the progress of the specified import job.

zh-CN.description: 返回指定导入任务的进度信息。
响应码。
导入任务 ID。

collectionName.description: Target collection name of the import job.

zh-CN.description: 导入任务的目标 Collection 名称。

fileName.description: Path of the data file object in the object storage.

zh-CN.description: 对象存储中存放的数据文件对象的路径。

fileSize.description: Size of the data file object.

zh-CN.description: 数据文件对象的大小。
当前导入任务的状态。

progress.description: Progress in percentage of the current import job.

zh-CN.description: 当前导入任务的进度百分比。

completeTime.description: Timestamp indicating when the import job is complete.

zh-CN.description: 当前导入任务的完成时间。

reason.description: Reason for the failure to import data. The value will be an empty string when the import job is successful.

zh-CN.description: 当前导入任务失败的原因。任务成功时为空字符串。

totalRows.description: Number of rows in the specified collection.

zh-CN.description: 当前导入任务在目标 Collection 中插入的 Entity 数量。

items.description: Detailed information about the processing of a source data file.

zh-CN.description: 关于一个数据文件处理情况的详细信息。

fileName.description: The name of a data file.

zh-CN.description: 数据文件名称。

fileSize.description: The size of the data file.

zh-CN.description: 数据文件大小。

state.description: The processing state of the data file.

zh-CN.description: 数据文件处理状态。
数据文件处理进度。

completeTime.description: The timestamp at which the file is processed.

zh-CN.description: 数据文件完成处理时间。

reason.description: The reason for the failure to import data. The value will be an empty string when the data file is successfully processed.

zh-CN.description: 数据文件导入失败原因。当数据文件成功处理时，该值为空。

totalRows.description: Number of rows inserted from this file.

zh-CN.description: 当前文件在目标 Collection 中插入的 Entity 数量。

details.description: Statistics on data import oriented to data files.

zh-CN.description: 按数据文件维度分别收集的数据导入统计信息。
响应负载。
返回错误消息。
响应码。
错误描述。
